title: New app feedback (Android users)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a super exciting opportunity for our community members!

Want to be among the first to know about a new app we’ve been working on and give your feedback to shape the future of our products?

Join the monday.com team this Thursday, July 27th, at 10:00am IDT to learn more about what we’re talking about

A few important details:

To participate, you’ll need to be using an Android device

Space is limited and will be allocated on a first come, first serve basis
